A_St_Aug_Sun.name: TRACK A: ST. AUGUSTINE — FULL SUN (60-70% of accounts) [v4.0
notes: ⚠ PRODIAMINE TIMING: Apply Visit 1 by January 15. Soil temps can hit 55°F germination window by late Jan in Sarasota/Man
⚠ CELSIUS CAP: Maximum 3 applications per property per year. Log every Celsius app. If maxed, use Blindside WDG or Three
⚠ K-FLOW ROTATION: Jun + Sep = K-Flow. Jul = Ca supplement. Aug = Mg/Ca supplement. Do NOT apply K-Flow every blackout m
★ NEW v4: N RATE CONTROL — Explicit lb N/1,000 per visit in Notes. Annual target: Basic/Std 1.5 lb N, Enh/Prem 3.0 lb N.
★ NEW v4: Soil-test branching — P index >80 skip 24-2-11, K >80 ppm skip K-Flow. Chinch IPM ≥20/sq ft threshold + MOA ro
★ NEW v4: FRAC rotation — Headway (11+3) Jan → Medallion (7) Feb → Torque (12) Oct. SpeedZone Apr weather-gated at 90°F.
★ NEW v4: Aug drive-by scout + Dec wellness touchpoint for Basic/Std. Thatch measurement V3+V10. Irrigation VWC audit V2

B_St_Aug_Shade.name: TRACK B: ST. AUGUSTINE — SHADE-STRESSED (15-20% of accounts)
notes: ⚠ CELSIUS WG ONLY for broadleaf — NEVER SpeedZone or aggressive three-ways on shade St. Aug (phytotoxicity risk).
⚠ NO PGR on shade St. Aug — turf is already growth-limited. Do NOT apply Primo Maxx.
⚠ Take-all root rot VERY HIGH risk — NEVER use azoxystrobin alone (Artavia/Heritage). Use Headway or Pillar ONLY.
⚠ N budget: 1.5-2.0 lb N/K/yr MAX. Light-adjusted: Heavy shade 1.0 lb, Moderate 1.3 lb, Dappled 1.5 lb. Only 2 fert apps
⚠ ATRAZINE WEATHER GATE: Apply ONLY if forecast high <85°F for 3 consecutive days. Defer to Dec if too warm.
★ NEW v4: Light classification (Heavy/Moderate/Dappled) at V1 drives N rate and fungicide intensity. Customer expectatio
★ NEW v4: TARR preventive calendar — scheduled (not conditional) for history properties. Nov-Mar: Pillar (11+3) → Medall
★ NEW v4: TARR pull-test diagnostic protocol at V3/V5/V7/V10 with trending. Photo documentation required.
★ NEW v4: Blindside WDG (Groups 14+2) as post-Celsius-cap fallback. Shade-safe, different MOA. No more "skip."
★ NEW v4: Irrigation VWC audit V2+V6 with shade-specific 35% threshold. Aug all-tier scout. Dec all-tier touchpoint.
★ NEW v4: FRAC rotation fixed — Pillar (11+3) Jan → Medallion (7) Feb → Torque (12) Oct. Basic/Std disease-history spot-

C1_Bermuda.name: ⚠ THIS IS BERMUDA ONLY — DO NOT USE THIS TRACK FOR ZOYSIA. S
notes: ⚠ SpeedZone Southern: NEVER apply above 90°F. In SWFL summer, use Celsius WG for Jul/Aug/Sep broadleaf instead.
⚠ NO Atrazine on Bermuda — Atrazine is ST. AUGUSTINE ONLY.
⚠ PGR: Primo Maxx every 3-4 weeks Mar-Oct. Document growth response each visit. Bermuda grows aggressively.
⚠ N budget: 3.0-4.0 lb N/K/yr. Explicit rates per visit below. Bermuda = high-input track.
★ NEW v4: SDS preventive fungicide calendar — Armada/Velista (FRAC 7) in Oct+Nov BEFORE soil temps <70°F. T-Storm replac
★ NEW v4: Armyworm IPM — soap flush threshold ≥3/sq ft. Curative rotation: Bifen (3A) → chlorantraniliprole (28) → spino
★ NEW v4: Mole cricket curative defined — Dylox 420 SL for adult activity beyond Acelepryn residual.
★ NEW v4: SpeedZone April weather-gated at 90°F. Soil-test branching. Thatch measurement V3+V10. Irrigation VWC audit.
★ NEW v4: PGR response documentation at each PGR visit — calibrate rate per property. Aug/Dec all-tier touchpoints.
★ NEW v4: FRAC rotation fixed — Armada (7) Oct → Armada (7) Nov → Torque (12) spring SDS followup. No FRAC 11 stacking.

C2_Zoysia.name: ⚠ THIS IS ZOYSIA ONLY — DO NOT USE THIS TRACK FOR BERMUDA. S
notes: ⚠ N budget: 2.0-3.0 lb N/K/yr MAX (UF/IFAS). Excess N = explosive thatch → severe Large Patch in fall.
⚠ PGR: Primo Maxx at CONSERVATIVE rates only. Document response. Over-regulation = months of thin turf.
⚠ Large Patch (Rhizoctonia): Zoysia is HIGHLY susceptible. Preventive fungicide Oct-Mar with FRAC rotation.
⚠ SpeedZone Southern: NEVER apply above 90°F. Use Celsius WG for Jul/Aug/Sep broadleaf.
⚠ NO Atrazine on Zoysia. NO Anuew EZ on Zoysia.
★ NEW v4: Large Patch FRAC rotation calendar — Headway (11+3) Oct → Medallion (7) Nov → Torque (12) Dec/Jan. No more tri
★ NEW v4: Large patch diagnostic criteria for techs — orange-brown rings with dark "smoke ring" advancing border.
★ NEW v4: Thatch measurement V3+V10. Zoysia trigger: >0.5" (lower than Bermuda 0.75" — denser thatch per inch).
★ NEW v4: SpeedZone April weather-gated at 90°F. Soil-test branching. PGR response documentation.
★ NEW v4: Irrigation VWC audit V2+V6. Aug all-tier scout. Dec all-tier touchpoint. Conditional ceiling $60.

D_Bahia.name: TRACK D: BAHIA (5-10% of accounts) [v4.0 REVISED]
notes: ⚠ Bahia is LOW-INPUT turf. 2.0 lb N/K/yr MAX. More N = more mowing, NOT better quality.
⚠ Mole cricket is THE primary insect threat — not chinch bugs. Soapy flush scout, not leaf inspection.
⚠ NO PGR. NO Atrazine. Customer expectations: Bahia will NEVER look like irrigated St. Augustine.
⚠ K-FLOW ROTATION: Alternate with Ca/Mg supplements during blackout to prevent cation imbalance.
★ NEW v4: Irrigated vs. Non-irrigated classification at V1 — drives product load. Non-irrigated: skip K-Flow, skip Moist
★ NEW v4: Mole cricket IPM — soapy water flush method defined. Threshold ≥2 per 2 sq ft. Acelepryn preventive + Dylox cu
★ NEW v4: T-Storm removed from Oct default — fungicide now conditional on active dollar spot only. Low-input = no "just
★ NEW v4: Fire ant protocol — Topchoice broadcast ONCE/yr at V4 for documented history. 12-month control. Prevents callb
★ NEW v4: Crabgrass breakthrough curative defined — Drive XLR8 (quinclorac), labeled for Bahia.
★ NEW v4: SpeedZone Sep weather-gated at 90°F. Soil-test branching. Explicit N rates (0.75 lb N/1K per app).
★ NEW v4: Seed head customer communication at V1+V7. Aug all-tier scout. Dec all-tier touchpoint. $60 conditional ceilin
★ NEW v4: Customer expectation framework structured at V1, V7 (seed heads), V12 (dormancy). Reduces cancellations.
